title: lepidium latifolium subsp. eulatifolium
intro: Lepidium latifolium subsp. eulatifolium, also known as perennial pepperwort, is a subspecies of the garden cress plant, characterized by its broad leaves and annual habit. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its rich content of vitamins, minerals, and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been reported to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Perennial pepperwort can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in herbal medicine.
